title: Grafana 12 — Upgrade Overview
description: Single-pane landing page for the v12 demo suite. Links to every feature dashboard and shows version + health of the underlying lab.

options.content:
## Grafana 12.0 — 12.4 feature dashboards

| Feature | Demo dashboard |
|---|---|
| Drilldown suite (Metrics / Logs / Traces / Profiles) | [v12.0 Drilldown Suite](/d/v12-0-drilldown/grafana-12-0-drilldown-suite) |
| React-data-grid table refactor | [v12.0 React Data Grid Table](/d/v12-0-table/grafana-12-0-react-data-grid-table) |
| Grafana-managed recording rules | [v12.0 Recording Rules](/d/v12-0-recording-rules/grafana-12-0-recording-rules) |
| SQL Expressions | [v12.0 SQL Expressions](/d/v12-0-sql-expr/grafana-12-0-sql-expressions) |
| Regression transformation | [v12.1 Regression Analysis](/d/v12-1-regression/grafana-12-1-regression-transform) |
| Visualization Actions | [v12.1 Visualization Actions](/d/v12-1-viz-actions/grafana-12-1-visualization-actions) |
| Ad-hoc filters (enhanced) | [v12.2 Ad-hoc Filters](/d/v12-2-adhoc/grafana-12-2-ad-hoc-filters) |
| Panel time-settings drawer | [v12.3 Panel Time Drawer](/d/v12-3-time-drawer/grafana-12-3-panel-time-drawer) |
| Multi-property variables | [v12.4 Multi-property Variables](/d/v12-4-multiprop/grafana-12-4-multi-property-variables) |
| Regex variable value transforms | [v12.4 Regex Variables](/d/v12-4-regex-vars/grafana-12-4-regex-variable-transforms) |
| Updated gauge panel (Circular + Arc) | [v12.4 Gauge Styles](/d/v12-4-gauge/grafana-12-4-gauge-styles) |
| OTLP log defaults | [v12.4 OTLP Logs](/d/v12-4-otlp/grafana-12-4-otlp-logs) |
| HA Alertmanager cluster metrics rename | [v12.4 HA Alertmanager Metrics](/d/v12-4-am-ha/grafana-12-4-ha-alertmanager)

## Drilldown apps (Grafana 12 core)

These replaced Explore Metrics/Logs/Traces and went GA in 12.0:

- [Metrics Drilldown](/a/grafana-metricsdrilldown-app)
- [Logs Drilldown](/a/grafana-lokiexplore-app)
- [Traces Drilldown](/a/grafana-exploretraces-app)
- [Profiles Drilldown](/a/grafana-pyroscope-app)

## Administration

- [Feature toggles](/admin/featuretoggles) — assert every required toggle is on
- [Plugin catalog](/plugins) — 12.0 revamped install flow
- [Grafana Advisor](/a/grafana-advisor-app) — 12.1 plugin/DS/SSO checks
- [Alert rule page](/alerting/new/alerting) — 12.1 GA
- [Dashboards](/dashboards) — browse all

## Source of truth

This lab targets the canonical pins and features documented in `docs/01-breaking-changes-matrix.md` (30-item playbook). Any toggle or breaking change referenced there has a live validator in `validation/gate.py`.
